brave.reason: Future versions have Manifest V2 dropped, breaking extensions

filezilla.reason: Other versions continue to nag the user about updates even if opted out

laravel.reason: Future versions have AI SDK, so probably vibe-coded slop

postman.reason: Future versions drop Scratch Pad or force it off unless logged in

visual-studio.reason: Future versions force user to update, and when user closes popup it closes the entire program
